title: Creating a Video Hub That Dominates Long-Tail Queries
excerpt: Stop relying solely on YouTube. Discover how hosting an optimized video hub on your own domain can supercharge your site's overall AEO and SEO performance.
author: Corey Spicer
content:
While YouTube is essential for reach, hosting video content natively on your own site is crucial for capturing direct domain traffic from Answer Engines.

The Power of a Video Resource Center

Create a dedicated, easily navigable video hub. Surround each embedded video with comprehensive text transcripts, key takeaways, and structured data. This creates a dense cluster of contextually relevant information that AI engines love to scrape and cite, driving traffic directly to *your* site, not YouTube's.
